src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Reordered import statements to group them alphabetically or by type, likely due to IDE auto-formatting rules.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Moved 'import group.msg.at.cloud.cloudtrain.core.entity.Message;' below 'import group.msg.at.cloud.cloudtrain.core.boundary.HelloWorld;' and removed an empty line.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Changed the CDI bean scope from Dependent to ApplicationScoped to align with modern Jakarta EE best practices for stateless resources.
Refactored Message object creation to use setter methods instead of a constructor, likely to accommodate changes in the Message entity or to ensure explicit field initialization.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: new Message(...) -> new Message(); result.setCode(...); result.setText(...); result.setLocale(...)

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Added explicit setting of the locale to ENGLISH on the Message object, ensuring consistent localization behavior.
Added a Locale field to the Message entity to support internationalization.
Removed the 'code' field from the Message entity as it is no longer needed.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Removed private String code; and associated getter/setter.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Simplified the Message constructor to only accept an ID, removing code and text parameters.
Updated equals and hashCode methods to rely solely on the ID field, removing dependencies on code and text.
Replaced Objects import with Locale import to match the new field and removed unused utility.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Consolidated two separate test methods for failure and success scenarios into a single comprehensive test method.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Removed getWelcomeMessageWithoutIdTokenFails and getWelcomeMessageWithIdTokenSucceeds, replacing them with a single testGetWelcomeMessage method.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Replaced Hamcrest matchers with AssertJ assertions for more fluent and readable test verification.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Replaced import static org.hamcrest.Matchers.startsWith with import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat and updated assertions to use assertThat().

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Added deserialization of the REST response into a strongly typed Message object to enable field-level assertions.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Added import for Message entity and used .extract().as(Message.class) to parse the response body.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Added explicit assertions for individual fields of the Message object to ensure data integrity.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Added assertThat checks for id, code, text, and locale fields of the deserialized Message object.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Bump the Quarkus framework version to 3.8.1 to support Java 21 and access newer features.
Switch from the blocking RESTEasy implementation to the reactive RESTEasy Jackson implementation for better performance on Java 21.
Add explicit dependency for Hibernate Validator to ensure bean validation works with the new Quarkus version.
Update JUnit Jupiter dependencies to version 5.10.1 for compatibility with modern test runners.
Bump RestAssured to version 5.4.0 to support Jakarta EE and Java 21.
Introduce AssertJ as a fluent assertion library for improved test readability.
Add Quarkus JUnit5 Mockito extension to facilitate mocking in tests.
Remove the obsolete cnj-common-test-jakarta dependency as it is no longer needed.
Update SLF4J to version 2.0.11 for security patches and compatibility.
Add explicit Log4j 2.22.1 dependency to manage logging implementation versions.
Add explicit Jackson 2.15.3 dependency to control JSON processing library version.
Add Flyway 9.19.1 dependency for database migration management.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver 42.6.0 dependency for database connectivity.
Update the internal common REST library to version 1.2.0.
Update the internal common persistence JPA library to version 1.2.0.
Update the internal common observability library to version 1.2.0.
Update the internal common test core library to version 1.2.0.
Bump Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.11.0 to ensure proper Java 21 compilation support.
Update Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.2.1 for better test execution on Java 21.
Update Maven Failsafe Plugin to 3.2.1 for integration test execution.
Bump Fabric8 Docker Maven Plugin to 0.43.4 for improved Docker image building.
Update Compose Maven Plugin to 5.1.0 for Docker Compose integration.
Update Helm Maven Plugin to 5.0.0 for Kubernetes Helm chart management.
Add OWASP Dependency-Check plugin to scan for vulnerable dependencies.
Add JaCoCo Maven Plugin to measure code coverage for unit and integration tests.
Configure Surefire to exclude SystemTest classes, delegating them to Failsafe.
Configure Failsafe to include only SystemTest classes for integration testing.
Define supported Docker platforms (amd64, arm64) for multi-arch image building.
Update the Kubernetes ingress host property to point to the new development environment.
Increment the project revision version to 3.0.0 to reflect the major upgrade.
Removed the 'local-stage' Maven profile to simplify the build configuration.
pom.xml.human_impl: Deleted the entire <profile> block with id 'local-stage'.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replaced complex plugin executions in 'pre-commit-stage' with simple property skips to disable heavy checks.
pom.xml.human_impl: Replaced <build> plugins with <properties> setting sonar.skip, dependency-check.skip, and jacoco.skip to true.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the 'commit-stage' Docker build to use Buildx for multi-platform support and removed manual resource copying.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added <buildx> configuration to docker-maven-plugin and removed maven-resources-plugin executions for docker resources.

pom.xml.general_idea: Removed explicit plugin configurations for compose, failsafe, jacoco, and sonar from 'commit-stage' relying on defaults or other profiles.
pom.xml.human_impl: Deleted plugin blocks for compose-maven-plugin, maven-failsafe-plugin, jacoco-maven-plugin, and sonar-maven-plugin from the profile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Simplified 'integration-test-stage' by skipping local docker/compose builds and using Helm for deployment.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added properties to skip sonar, compose, docker, dependency-check, and jacoco; replaced resource copying with helm-maven-plugin pull/deploy.

pom.xml.general_idea: Added explicit repository definitions for dependencies and plugins to ensure access to internal artifacts.

README.md.general_idea: Refine the project description to explicitly mention MicroProfile JWT Auth and multi-architecture Docker support.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced generic description with detailed text about MicroProfile JWT Auth and linux/amd64/arm64/v8 support.

README.md.general_idea: Add a comprehensive synopsis section explaining the MicroProfile JWT Auth integration, configuration, and usage.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Synopsis' section with Java code snippets for @LoginConfig and configuration parameters.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the empty build status badge with a functional AWS CodeBuild badge.
README.md.human_impl: Updated markdown image link to point to codebuild.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for pulling the Docker image and Helm chart from the registry.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Docker Pull Command' and 'Helm Pull Command' sections with specific URLs.

README.md.general_idea: Clarify local build instructions and rename the section for better clarity.
README.md.human_impl: Renamed 'Build this application' to 'HOW-TO build this application locally' and updated result description.

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions for running the showcase locally using docker-compose.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'HOW-TO start and stop this showcase locally' section with docker compose up/down commands.

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions and examples for demonstrating the application's functionality.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'HOW-TO demo this showcase' section with endpoint URLs and JSON response example.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Explicitly install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to support the target Java version.
Add environment variable for the artifact ID to be used in git operations.
Add parameter store reference for git tag user configuration.
Add parameter store reference for git tag email configuration.
Add parameter store reference to control OWASP dependency check skipping.
Add secrets manager reference for GitHub token used in git push operations.
Add secrets manager reference for NIST NVD API key used in vulnerability scanning.
Refactor Maven build command to dynamically extract version components from pom.xml and use webhook branch info instead of hardcoded main branch.
buildspec.yml.human_impl: export VERSION_REVISION=$(grep -m 1 '<revision>' pom.xml ...); mvn clean deploy ... -Dchangelist=.$VERSION_CHANGELIST

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Change Maven goal from install to deploy to publish artifacts to the repository during the build phase.
Update SonarQube authentication property from login to token to align with newer SonarQube scanner requirements.
Add property to allow skipping OWASP dependency check scans based on environment configuration.
Add steps to configure git user, create an annotated tag with the project version, and push it to the remote repository.
buildspec.yml.human_impl: git config user.name ...; git tag -a $PROJECT_VERSION ...; git push origin HEAD:$VERSION_CHANGELIST $PROJECT_VERSION

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from a JRE 17 variant to a JRE 21 variant to align with the target JDK version.
Replace MetaspaceSize tuning with ZGC and ZGenerational flags to utilize Java 21's generational Z Garbage Collector.
Explicitly set the file encoding to UTF-8 via JVM argument to ensure consistent character handling.

src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.general_idea: Removed the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml to align with modern Docker Compose specifications.
Updated the header comment to remove the specific 'Java EE' reference, making it more generic.
src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.human_impl: Changed 'runnable Java EE application' to 'runnable application'
